title: An Act to Amend the Laws Regarding Nuisance Dogs
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 8, 2025
last_house_action: 1/8/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/8/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
